recommendations.title: Let It Snow
recommendations.overview: Jean-Gabriel intends to spend Christmas in the mountains quietly with his family. Many unforeseen events occur, but Jean-Gabriel will do everything to overcome them...

recommendations.title: The First Star
recommendations.overview: A married father of three, lives in Créteil doing odd jobs and spends his time at the local PMU bar. One day, to please his daughter, he promises a little too quick to take the whole family on vacation to ski. The only problem: if he breaks his promi

recommendations.title: He Even Has Your Eyes
recommendations.overview: Paul is married to Sali. Everything would be fine if they could get a child. Until the day when Sali receives the call that they have been waiting for so long: their adoption file is approved. He is adorable, he is 6 months old, his name is Benjamin.

recommendations.title: The Full House
recommendations.overview: Antoine, a bachelor party-goer, gets new roommates: Jeanne and her two children.

recommendations.title: Ménage
recommendations.overview: A bisexual petty criminal named Bob encounters a married couple arguing in a bar. Bob breaks up the fight and proceeds to seduce first the wife and then the husband. Then Bob teaches the couple how to be burglars and they join him in his criminal exp

recommendations.title: Germinal
recommendations.overview: It's mid 19th century, north of France. The story of a coal miner's town. They are exploited by the mine's owner. One day the decide to go on strike, and then the authorities repress them.

recommendations.title: If I Were a Boy
recommendations.overview: Jeanne wakes up one morning and her life is about to take a funny turn, at first sight nothing has changed in her - to a small detail.

recommendations.title: The Blue Dahlia
recommendations.overview: Soon after a veteran returns from war, his cheating wife is found dead. He evades police in an attempt to find the real murderer.

recommendations.title: In Safe Hands
recommendations.overview: Théo is given up for adoption by his biological mother on the very day he is born. After this anonymous birth, the mother has two months to change her mind… Or not. The child welfare services and adoption service spring into action… The former have t

recommendations.title: Fletch Lives
recommendations.overview: Fletch is a fish out of water in small-town Louisiana, where he's checking out a tumbledown mansion he's inherited. When a woman he flirts with turns up dead, he becomes a suspect and must find the killer and clear his name.
